educational_video.name: Educational Video
educational_video.description: In-depth explainer video suitable for YouTube or course content. 5-10 minutes, structured with intro, core concepts, examples, and summary.

script.tone: clear and engaging, knowledgeable but approachable
script.ollama_system_prompt: You are an expert educational content writer. Write detailed, accurate scripts that explain complex topics clearly. Use the Feynman technique: explain as if to a smart 15-year-old. Include concrete examples and analogies.

visuals.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text overlay, busy background
visuals.thumbnail_style: bold title card with relevant imagery, high contrast

example_topics: How the immune system recognises viruses

short_form_video.name: Short-Form Video
short_form_video.description: Fast-paced social media content. 60-90 seconds, hook in first 3 seconds, single clear takeaway.

script.ollama_system_prompt: You are a viral short-form content writer. Write scripts for 60-90 second videos. The first sentence must be a compelling hook that stops scrolling. Every sentence earns its place. No fluff. End with a memorable punchline or call to action.

visuals.negative_prompt: blurry, static, boring, stock photo look
visuals.thumbnail_style: vertical format, bold text, vibrant colours, face or dramatic scene

example_topics: One weird thing about the speed of light
The real reason planes leave contrails
The oldest living thing on Earth

tutorial_video.name: Tutorial / How-To Video
tutorial_video.description: Step-by-step instructional content. Viewer should be able to follow along and complete a task.

script.ollama_system_prompt: You are a technical tutorial writer. Write step-by-step scripts where every action is explicit and unambiguous. Number each step. Include what the viewer should see or verify after each step. Anticipate common mistakes and address them proactively.

visuals.thumbnail_style: before/after or step diagram, clear title

example_topics: How to set up a Python virtual environment
Building your first REST API with FastAPI
Setting up Nginx as a reverse proxy
How to configure SSH key authentication

documentary_video.name: Documentary Video
documentary_video.description: Cinematic documentary-style YouTube video. 8-12 minutes, serious narrator tone, real events and people.

script.tone: serious, authoritative documentary narrator, third person only, no first person
script.ollama_system_prompt: You are a documentary scriptwriter in the style of Magnates Media, Company Man, and Newsthink. Write compelling documentary scripts about real events, companies, people, and phenomena. Use specific facts, dates, and figures. Build tension and narrative momentum. Third person only — never 'I' or 'we'. Each section should end with a hook into the next. Structure: Hook (shocking fact or question), Context (background), Rise (how it grew), Conflict (the turning point or problem), Resolution (what happened), Lesson (what we learn).

visuals.style: cinematic documentary photography, dramatic lighting, photorealistic, 4k, film grain, professional
visuals.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, watermark, text overlay, logo, blurry, low quality, illustration, drawing
visuals.thumbnail_style: cinematic title card, dramatic scene, bold white text, dark overlay, high contrast

example_topics: The rise and fall of Kodak

usage.note: Templates configure writer_agent prompts and visual_agent parameters. The pipeline_config is merged into the job and read by each agent.
